mapper.select: SELECT sat_id as satId, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT sat_id as satId, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE sat_id = #{satId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, monthly_amount, maturity_date ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, #{balance}, #{interestRate}, #{accountStatus}, #{monthlyAmount}, #{maturityDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = #{balance}, interest_rate = #{interestRate}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, monthly_amount = #{monthlyAmount}, maturity_date = #{maturityDate} WHERE sat_id = #{satId}
